arguments.Description: "Implement the monthly prayer times screen (Aylık Namaz Vakitleri) loader, date formatters, highlighting for today's row, and responsive vertical data table layout at the end of tool_detail_screen.dart."
arguments.Instruction: "Add _loadMonthlyPrayerTimes, _isToday, _formatRowDate, _buildNamazVakitleriAylik, _buildHeaderCell, and _buildTimeCell helper methods inside _ToolDetailScreenState class at the end of the file."
